use_codes.desc: MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF BRONCHOSPASM ASSOCIATED WITH COPD, INCLUDING CHRONIC BRONCHITIS AND EMPHYSEMA, AND REDUCTION OF EXACERBATIONS IN COPD PATIENTS.

indications.text:
1.1 Maintenance Treatment of Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
SPIRIVA RESPIMAT (tiotropium bromide) is indicated for the long-term, once-daily, maintenance treatment of bronchospasm associated with chronic obstructive
pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and emphysema. SPIRIVA...

pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and emphysema. SPIRIVA...

SPIRIVA RESPIMAT (tiotropium bromide) is indicated for the long-term, once-daily, maintenance treatment of bronchospasm associated with chronic obstructive
pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and emphysema. SPIRIVA RESPIMAT is indicated to reduce exacerbations in COPD patients.
